title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Alon Muroch - Compose Network: Connecting Every Corner of Ethereum
description:
Alon Muroch (SSV Labs, Founder & CEO) will introduce compose.network, a new Ethereum-aligned ZK composability layer that turns today’s many L2s into a network of interconnected, composable ZK rollups, delivering one-click UX and same-slot withdrawals. Alon will outline how a credibly neutral Wrapped Publisher, backed by Ethereum validators, coordinates a 2PC commit across rollups with pre-announced inbox/outbox slots; ERC-4337 wallets compressing multi-domain flows; and ZK proofs (scaled by OP Stack + Succinct) make cross-rollup execution instant and atomic. No bridges, no juggling multiple webapps, no delayed execution. This approach, (Based, Atomic, Synchronous Composability), reconnects users and liquidity across applications, rollups keep their sequencing sovereignty, and publish back using Ethereum validators to preserve decentralization. Builder-first, the talk leaves attendees with integration pathways, user-retention frameworks, and a clear comparison to today’s async, bridge-fronted liquidity flows.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
